title: Dominic — twisted psychological chamber, Oct 2024
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir checking in on his cousin Dominic Oct 31 2024 (from China). Dominic is in "a twisted psychological chamber" — living alone, hard drugs have "fucked him up massively."
  • Dominic just described to him a recurring nightmare: a sadistic doctor mentally torturing him, forcing him to say things he doesn't want to say, punishing him otherwise.
  • Yahir's read: "Poor fucking soul rn." But Dominic is "doing some right things by attending meetings and properly seeking help."
  • Yahir's regret: "I regret not staying in touch the last few years when this developed, but it's too late to think about that now."
  • Closing prayer: "Rebuild Dominic, you have found strength and it's time."

Key quote

"I regret not staying in touch the last few years when this developed, but it's too late to think about that now."

Why it matters in the graph

  • Origin/anchor of the Dominic-mental-health arc — pairs directly with:
    • 2024 11 15 dominic dreams (the doctor-torture nightmare, two weeks later)
    • 2025 06 21 on bubbas (eight months later, deteriorated further: "abstract brain numb entity," concerns about suicide, Sammy needs his brother)
  • The doctor-torture motif Dominic reports here is the same nightmare documented in 2024 11 15 dominic dreams — Yahir is preserving Dominic's accounts almost verbatim across notes.
  • Confirms dominic as a clear standalone entity (already exists in entities; this is a major source of his content).
  • The "regret not staying in touch" line is one of Yahir's clearest family-as-responsibility lines, paired with the debt of gratitude / "people I am indebted to" frame.

Open questions

  • Which meetings is Dominic attending — AA, NA, court-mandated?
  • Where geographically is Dominic at this point — same place as tio edgar and maile?

Wikilinks
